overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a dark fantasy video game depicting a character traversing a foggy, snow-covered wasteland at night. The character carries a lantern through heavy fog, encounters wildlife, and navigates increasingly rocky terrain.

events.description: two wolf-like creatures emerge from the fog and run across the path from right to left

agents.ego_description: running steadily forward through the foggy snowfield while holding a lantern

notable_agents.action: two wolf-like creatures running across the path from right to left

entered.detail: flat snow-covered terrain stretching into the fog

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a desolate, foggy snowfield at night, illuminated only by their lantern. Two wolf-like creatures suddenly emerge from the fog and cross the path ahead before disappearing back into the mist.

agents.ego_description: continuing to run forward as the landscape transitions to include scattered rocks and boulders on both sides

entered.detail: dark rock outcroppings emerging from the snow on the left side
boulders and rocks visible through the fog on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character continues moving through the foggy wasteland as the terrain gradually becomes more uneven. Scattered rocks and boulders emerge on both sides of the path, and sparse dead vegetation becomes visible in the distance.

events.description: terrain becomes significantly rockier with large boulders requiring navigation around obstacles

agents.ego_description: navigating through a field of large rocks and boulders, adjusting direction to find a path forward

entered.detail: massive boulders and rock clusters blocking parts of the path ahead
inclined rocky terrain rising ahead into the fog

segments.scene_description: The character enters a more confined rocky area with large boulders and rock formations. The terrain becomes uneven and requires navigation around obstacles, with the ground transitioning from flat snow to rocky, uneven surfaces as the character moves deeper into the wasteland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate, snow-covered wasteland that gradually transforms from an open field into a confined rocky corridor. It begins with the character running through a dense, nighttime fog illuminated only by a lantern, just as two wolf-like creatures emerge from the mist and cross the path. As the character pushes forward, the flat snowfield begins to shift, with scattered boulders and sparse, dead vegetation appearing along the edges of the trail. The scene then narrows as the terrain becomes increasingly uneven, transitioning from soft snow to a rugged landscape of large rock formations. Finally, the camera navigates deeper into the wasteland, weaving through a confined area of towering boulders and jagged surfaces.
